discrepancies.title: Net Worth vs Income Reconciliation Failure
discrepancies.description: Calculated Net Worth is ₹34,396,324, but 5-year family income is only ₹7,677,567. Unexplained wealth discrepancy of ₹26,718,757.

discrepancies.title: Suspicious Property Overvaluation
discrepancies.description: Self Agricultural Land purchased in 2003 for ₹256,370 (CII Indexed Cost: ₹884,359) is declared at highly inflated value of ₹13,500,000.

discrepancies.title: Gold Heavily Undervalued (Tax/Duty Evasion)
discrepancies.description: 2252.5g gold declared at ₹18,933,480 (Implied rate: ₹8,406/g vs April 2026 Market Rate of ~₹14,200/g).

discrepancies.title: Mathematical Mismatch (Assets)
discrepancies.description: Sum of individual assets (₹36,188,342) does not match declared total assets (₹45,422,256). Difference: ₹9,233,914
